caption: A man wearing a distinctive tall, silver-grey pointed wig, glasses, and headphones speaks into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. Behind him, the background features a wall decorated with several framed photographs and a display of clothing on mannequins, including a black vest and a yellow garment labeled "LEE." A logo on the bottom left of the screen reads "THE TALK PODCAST," while text on the right side reads "BOSS TALK JOY." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and slightly shifting his facial expressions and head posture as he addresses someone off-screen. The camera angle remains steady, capturing him from the chest up in a medium shot.
